inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: subtype
inputFields.description: The account subtype classification.

inputFields.name: currency
inputFields.description: Currency of the account. Will default to business's currency.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the account.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: User defined description for the account.

inputFields.name: displayId
inputFields.description: User defined id for the account.

inputFields.name: restrictions
inputFields.description: Rules around how a user is able to modify this account. This field is only usable for specific applications.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the account.

inputFields.name: sequence
inputFields.description: The most recent reversion you are aware of. As soon as something modifies an account, its sequence is incremented.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the account.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: User defined description for the account. Use null to unset the current value.

inputFields.name: displayId
inputFields.description: User defined id for the account. Use null to unset the current value.

AccountCreateRestrictions.name: AccountCreateRestrictions
AccountCreateRestrictions.description: Rules around how a user is able to modify this account.

inputFields.name: canArchive
inputFields.description: Whether or not a user can archive this account.

inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the product.

inputFields.name: unitPrice
inputFields.description: Price per unit in the major currency unit (rounded to nearest 5 decimal places with ties going away from zero).

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Product description.

inputFields.name: defaultSalesTaxIds
inputFields.description: Default sales taxes to apply on product.

inputFields.name: incomeAccountId
inputFields.description: Income account to associate with this product. Account must be one of subtypes: `INCOME`, `DISCOUNTS`, `OTHER_INCOME`.

inputFields.name: expenseAccountId
inputFields.description: Expense account to associate with this product. Account must be one of subtypes: `EXPENSE`, `COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD`, `PAYMENT_PROCESSING_FEES`, `PAYROLL_EXPENSES`.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the product.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the product.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Description of the product.

inputFields.name: unitPrice
inputFields.description: Price per unit in the major currency unit (rounded to nearest 5 decimal places with ties going away from zero).

inputFields.name: defaultSalesTaxIds
inputFields.description: Default sales taxes to apply on product.

inputFields.name: incomeAccountId
inputFields.description: Income account to associate with this product. Account must be one of subtypes: `INCOME`, `DISCOUNTS`, `OTHER_INCOME`.

inputFields.name: expenseAccountId

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the product.

inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the tax.

inputFields.name: abbreviation
inputFields.description: An short form or code representing the sales tax. Max 10 characters, and MUST BE UNIQUE within business.

inputFields.name: rate
inputFields.description: The current rate, as a decimal (e.g. 0.15 represents 15%; rounded to nearest 6 decimal places with ties going away from zero).

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: User defined description for the sales tax.

inputFields.name: taxNumber
inputFields.description: The tax's issued identification number from a taxing authority.

inputFields.name: showTaxNumberOnInvoices
inputFields.description: Display tax number beside the tax name on an invoice.

inputFields.name: isCompound
inputFields.description: Is a compound tax, or stacked tax. This tax is calculated on top of the subtotal and other tax amounts.

inputFields.name: isRecoverable
inputFields.description: Is a recoverable tax. It is recoverable if you can deduct the tax that you as a business paid from the tax that you have collected.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the sales tax.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Name of the tax.

inputFields.name: abbreviation
inputFields.description: An short form or code representing the sales tax

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: User defined description for the sales tax.

inputFields.name: taxNumber
inputFields.description: The tax's issued identification number from a taxing authority.

inputFields.name: showTaxNumberOnInvoices
inputFields.description: Display tax number beside the tax name on an invoice.

inputFields.name: rates
inputFields.description: Tax rate information.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the sales tax.

inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: externalId
inputFields.description: ID of the transaction in an external system. If you don't have one, generate a UUID and provide it.

inputFields.name: date
inputFields.description: Date of the transaction.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Description for the transaction.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description: Extra notes about the transaction.

inputFields.name: anchor
inputFields.description: Anchor item.

inputFields.name: lineItems
inputFields.description: Line items.

inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: transactions
inputFields.description: Array of transactions to create.

inputFields.name: businessId
inputFields.description: The unique identifier for the business.

inputFields.name: customerId
inputFields.description: The customer identifier to associate with invoice.

inputFields.name: status
inputFields.description: Status of the Invoice.

inputFields.name: currency
inputFields.description: Currency of the invoice. If not provided, will use the business's default currency.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: Invoice title at the top of the document. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice title.

inputFields.name: subhead
inputFields.description: Invoice subheading text. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice subheading.

inputFields.name: invoiceNumber
inputFields.description: Unique number assigned to the invoice. If not provided, will find the current largest invoice number and add 1.

inputFields.name: poNumber
inputFields.description: Purchase order or sales order number for the invoice.

inputFields.name: invoiceDate
inputFields.description: Date when invoice is issued. If not provided, will use today's date.

inputFields.name: exchangeRate
inputFields.description: Exchange rate to business's currency from the invoice's currency. Used to value the invoice income within Wave's accounting transactions.

inputFields.name: dueDate
inputFields.description: Date when payment is due. If not provided, will apply the business's default invoice payment terms to `invoiceDate` value.

inputFields.name: items
inputFields.description: The line items (product, unit and price) that make up the invoiced sale.

inputFields.name: discounts
inputFields.description: The discounts applied to the invoice (currently limited to max 1).

inputFields.name: memo
inputFields.description: Invoice memo (notes) text. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice memo.

inputFields.name: footer
inputFields.description: Invoice footer text. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice footer.

inputFields.name: disableAmexPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept credit card payments, indicates if this individual invoice has been marked to not be payable by american express payment. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice settings american express payment state.

inputFields.name: disableCreditCardPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept credit card payments, indicates if this individual invoice has been marked to not be payable by card. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice credit card payment state.

inputFields.name: disableBankPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept bank payments, indicates if this individual invoice has been marked to not be payable by bank payment. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice bank payment state.

inputFields.name: itemTitle
inputFields.description: The label for the 'Item' column in the listing of line items on the invoice. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice column item title.

inputFields.name: unitTitle
inputFields.description: The label for the 'Unit' column in the listing of line items on the invoice. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice column unit title.

inputFields.name: priceTitle
inputFields.description: The label for the 'Price' column in the listing of line items on the invoice. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice column price title.

inputFields.name: amountTitle
inputFields.description: The label for the 'Amount' (= unit x price) column in the listing of line items on the invoice. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice column amount title.

inputFields.name: hideName
inputFields.description: Indicates whether item's product name in item column is hidden in the line items listing. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice item name visibility.

inputFields.name: hideDescription
inputFields.description: Indicates whether item's description in item column is hidden in the line items listing. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice item description visibility.

inputFields.name: hideUnit
inputFields.description: Indicates whether item's unit is hidden in the line items listing. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice item unit visibility.

inputFields.name: hidePrice
inputFields.description: Indicates whether item's price is hidden in the line items listing. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice item price visibility.

inputFields.name: hideAmount
inputFields.description: Indicates whether item's amount is hidden in the line items listing. If not provided, will use the business's default invoice item amount visibility.

inputFields.name: requireTermsOfServiceAgreement
inputFields.description: Indicates whether the customer is required to accept the terms of service.

inputFields.name: currency

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: Estimate title at the top of the document. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate title.

inputFields.name: subhead
inputFields.description: Estimate subheading text. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate subheading.

inputFields.name: estimateNumber
inputFields.description: Unique number assigned to the estimate. If not provided, one will be system generated.

inputFields.name: poNumber
inputFields.description: Purchase order or sales order number for the estimate.

inputFields.name: estimateDate
inputFields.description: Date when estimate is issued. If not provided, will use today's date

inputFields.name: dueDate
inputFields.description: Date when payment is due. If not provided, will apply the business's default estimate payment terms to `estimateDate` value.

inputFields.name: exchangeRate
inputFields.description: Exchange rate to business's currency from the estimate's currency. Used to value the estimate income within Wave's accounting transactions.

inputFields.name: items
inputFields.description: The line items (product, unit and price) that make up the estimated sale.

inputFields.name: discounts
inputFields.description: The discounts applied to estimate.

inputFields.name: attachmentIds
inputFields.description: List of attachment ids to be associated with the estimate.

inputFields.name: memo
inputFields.description: Estimate memo (notes) text. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate memo.

inputFields.name: footer
inputFields.description: Estimate footer text. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate footer.

inputFields.name: disableAmexPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept credit card payments, indicates if this individual estimate has been marked to not be payable by american express payment. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate settings american express payment state.

inputFields.name: disableCreditCardPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept credit card payments, indicates if this individual estiamte has been marked to not be payable by card. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate credit card payment state.

inputFields.name: disableBankPayments
inputFields.description: Within a business that is enabled to accept bank payments, indicates if this individual estimate has been marked to not be payable by bank payment. If not provided, will use the business's default estimate bank payment state.

enumValues.name: DUE_TO_YOU_AND_OTHER_OWNERS
enumValues.description: Due to You and Other Business Owners

enumValues.name: RETAINED_EARNINGS
enumValues.description: Retained Earnings: Profit and Business Owner Drawing

enumValues.name: ASSET
enumValues.description: Represents the different types of economic resources owned or controlled by an entity.

enumValues.name: EQUITY
enumValues.description: Represents the residual equity of an entity.

enumValues.name: LIABILITY
enumValues.description: Represents the different types of economic obligations of an entity.

enumValues.name: DECREASE
enumValues.description: Decrease using the inverse of the account's normal balance type. For contra accounts whose subtype is `DISCOUNTS` or `DEPRECIATION_AND_AMORTIZATION`, apply the amount in the account's normal balance type.

enumValues.name: INCREASE
enumValues.description: Increase using the account's normal balance type. For contra accounts whose subtype is `DISCOUNTS` or `DEPRECIATION_AND_AMORTIZATION`, apply the amount in the inverse of the account's normal balance type.

enumValues.name: DRAFT
enumValues.description: The invoice is still a draft.

enumValues.description: The estimate is still a draft.

enumValues.description: The estimate is still a draft.

enumValues.description: Estimate deposit value is an amount in cents.

enumValues.description: Estimate deposit value is a percentage.
